description: A fully featured KillAura module with multiple autoblock and rotation bypass modes for different anti-cheats.

base_class.name: Module
hooks: onPreUpdate() - called every tick before movement
onPreMotion() - called at the start of a movement packet
onPostMotion() - called after a movement packet is sent
onSprint() - called when sprinting state changes
onPreInput() - called before movement input is processed
onEvent(Event e) - called for custom events (e.g., PacketReceiveEvent)
helper_methods: sendPacket(Packet p) - sends a packet through the player's network queue
getUppercaseSuffix(String name) - returns formatted suffix for display name

fields.validTargets: ArrayList<EntityLivingBase> - pool of entities within attack range
fields.oldTarget: EntityLivingBase - previous target (used for rotation reset detection)
fields.lastTarget: EntityLivingBase - most recently selected target (used for switch delay logic)
fields.lastSwitchTime: long - timestamp of last target switch
fields.blocking: boolean - whether we are currently blocking (holding right click state)
fields.blinking: boolean - whether blink packet queue is active
fields.swapped: boolean - whether held item slot was swapped for bypass
fields.b2: boolean - flag for Hypixel3 delayed blink/block sequencing
fields.b3: boolean - flag indicating blink is active for certain autoblock modes
fields.postBlock: boolean - flag controlling block timing for Hypixel3 sequences
fields.rotTick: int - tick counter for rotations (used for rotation delay)
fields.asw: int - state machine counter for multi-tick autoblock sequences
fields.attack: int - attack counter within a blocking sequence
fields.nextTick: int - negative value used as flag to slow movement in preInput
fields.reached: int - attack counter for Hypixel reach bypass

type_system.Slider: double value with min, max, optional integer-only mode
type_system.ModeBox: String selection from a list of options

mode_boxes.name: Autoblock
mode_boxes.description: BlocksMC, Hypixel, Hypixel2, Hypixel3, Vulcan, and Legit are advanced bypass modes using packet queuing (blink) and item swapping

mode_boxes.name: Rotations
mode_boxes.description: Methods for calculating and applying look rotations to face targets

filters: Not on same team (if Teams setting is enabled) - uses Utils.teamMate() which checks isOnSameTeam + name prefix match
Inventory must not be open (mc.currentScreen !instanceof GuiInventory)
If Sword Only enabled, player must be holding a sword
Only EntityPlayer, EntityMob, or EntityAnimal types allowed

priority.step_1: Entities within Attack Range are added to validTargets list
priority.step_2: If validTargets is empty, falls back to the nearest entity within max(range) (extended range target)
priority.step_3: If lastTarget is null, or switch delay elapsed (and Switch On Attack is off), or lastTarget is invalid, pick random from validTargets
priority.note: When Switch On Attack is on, target switching only happens in the attack() method, not in getTarget()

target_selection.range_check: isTargetInRange() uses raycast-based distance check: creates a Vec3 from eye position in the direction of rotations, then checks if the line intersects the target's bounding box within range

shared_behavior.onPreMotion(): If target exists and within rotation range and bednuker is not rotating, increment rotTick and apply rotation
shared_behavior.rotation_apply: Sets mc.thePlayer.rotationYawHead and mc.thePlayer.rotationPitchHead (NOT the player's actual rotationYaw/rotationPitch)
shared_behavior.body_rotation: If Rotate Body enabled, also sets renderYawOffset to follow rotationYawHead smoothly (clamped to -75/+75 with 0.3 lerp)

rotation_modes.Normal: Uses getRotationFromPosition() -> applyGCD() -> sets head rotations

Hypixel.calculation: Uses prediction (e.pos - e.lastTickPos) for leading, targets slightly below eye level (y - 3.25 + eyeHeight), special quadrant handling for yaw
Hypixel.note: Rotations are calculated inside RotationUtils.getRotations(), not in KillAura itself

Vulcan.calculation: Same position math as Hypixel but with yaw smoothing: clamps yaw change to max 90 + random per tick

Grim.calculation: Normal rotation calculation but only applies if yaw/pitch change exceeds 20-degree threshold (prevents micro-rotations)

rotation_modes.gcd_fix: applyGCD() is applied to all rotation modes. It quantizes rotation deltas using mouse sensitivity formula: f = sens * 0.6 + 0.2, gcd = f^3 * 8, then yawDelta = (rot - current) / 0.15, delta = (int)delta, final = current + delta * 0.15

autoblock_modes.general_note: All autoblock modes check isTargetInRange(target, blockRange) && holdingSword() before executing. The block() method sends C08PacketPlayerBlockPlacement with the held item, toggling block state. The unblock() method sends C07PacketPlayerDigging with Action.RELEASE_USE_ITEM.
autoblock_modes.None: No blocking behavior. Falls through to the generic attack logic.
autoblock_modes.Fake: No blocking behavior. Same as None.

Vanilla.description: Sends block placement packet every tick while target is in range.
Vanilla.behavior: onPreUpdate(): if target in block range and holding sword, sends C08PacketPlayerBlockPlacement(mc.thePlayer.getHeldItem()). Does NOT manage unblocking.
Vanilla.attack: Handled by the generic attack logic below

NCP.description: Blocks in onPostMotion() and unblocks in onPreUpdate() each tick.
NCP.block_timing: onPostMotion(): if target in block range and holding sword, calls block() -> sends C08PacketPlayerBlockPlacement
NCP.unblock_timing: onPreUpdate(): calls unblock() -> sends C07PacketPlayerDigging RELEASE_USE_ITEM
NCP.attack: Handled by the generic attack logic

Vulcan.description: Blocks while not attacking, unblocks to attack. Uses blink to hide packets.
sequence: If currently blocking: increment blockTick, unblock(), increment attack counter
If not blocking: if attack < 4 and target in attack range, attack + set motion to 0.97
Otherwise: reset attack to 0, block(), stop blink
Vulcan.packets: Uses BlinkUtils to queue packets while unblocking, then releases them when blocking resumes

Legit.description: Similar to Vulcan but with simpler CPS calculation (average of min/max) and delay-based attack timing.
sequence: If blocking: increment blockTick, blink(true), unblock()
If not blocking: calc CPS as (minCPS + maxCPS) / 2, delay = 1000/CPS
Wait for attack delay, then attack if in range

BlocksMC.description: 3-tick state machine: attack+block -> swap item -> swap back. Uses blink to hide the item swap.

state_machine.tick_1_(asw=0): Increment attack. If target in attack range and rotTick>0: rayTrace target for precise hit detection, send C02PacketUseEntity with hitVec, send C02PacketUseEntity INTERACT. Block. Stop blink.
state_machine.tick_2_(asw=1): Start blink. Send C09PacketHeldItemChange((currentSlot + 1) % 9). swapped = true.
state_machine.tick_3_(asw=2): Start blink. Send C09PacketHeldItemChange(currentSlot). If blocking, unblock. swapped = false. asw = 0 (loop).

BlocksMC.movement_input: If target in block range and holding sword and nextTick < 0: strafe *= 0.2, forward *= 0.2, sprint timer = 0
BlocksMC.sprint: Disabled via KeyBinding.setKeyBindState(sprint, false) on every tick

Hypixel.description: 2-tick state machine: unblock+swap -> swap back+attack+block. Uses blink.

state_machine.tick_1_(asw=0): b3=true, blink(true). Increment attack counter. Pick random slot (0-8) different from current. If blocking, unblock. asw=1.
state_machine.tick_2_(asw=1): If target in attack range (with optional reach bypass): attack(entity, interact=true). Else if in rotation range: swingItem(). Block. Stop blink. Start blink. asw=0.

Hypixel.movement_input: Same as BlocksMC (strafe*=0.2, forward*=0.2) when nextTick < 0

Hypixel2.description: 5-tick state machine: unblock+swap -> swap back -> wait -> wait -> attack+block. More delays for stricter anti-cheats.

state_machine.tick_1_(asw=0): b3=true, blink(true). Increment attack. Random slot swap (C09PacketHeldItemChange). If blocking, unblock. swapped=true. asw=1.
state_machine.tick_2_(asw=1): If swapped: send C09PacketHeldItemChange(original slot). swapped=false. asw=2.
state_machine.tick_3_(asw=2): asw=3. Only continue if postBlock is true, else break.
state_machine.tick_4_(asw=3): asw=4. Only continue if postBlock is true, else break.
state_machine.tick_5_(asw=4): Attack if in range (with reach bypass and not bednuking). Block. Set b2=true. postBlock = (attack % 2 == 0). asw=0.

Hypixel3.description: 3-tick state machine with more nuanced blink/block control.

state_machine.tick_1_(asw=0): b3=true. If postBlock: block + stopBlink. Start blink. Increment attack. If blocking and !postBlock: unblock. asw=1.
state_machine.tick_3_(asw=2): Attack if in range (with reach bypass and not bednuking). Set postBlock=false. nextTick=-1. Block. If not lagrange blinking: set b2=true. asw=0.

Hypixel3.onSprint_hook: If b2=true and autoblock=Hypixel3: block(), stopBlink(), startBlink(), b2=false
Hypixel3.movement_input: Same slow-down as other Hypixel/BlocksMC modes when nextTick < 0

generic_attack_(non-autoblock_modes).condition: target in attack range (or reach bypass range if applicable) AND CPS delay elapsed AND autoblock is not one of the special modes (BlocksMC, Legit, Vulcan, Hypixel, Hypixel2, Hypixel3)
generic_attack_(non-autoblock_modes).note: CPS delay = 1000 / random(minCPS..maxCPS+7). If minCPS > maxCPS, they are swapped.

pre_checks: If Velocity module is delaying and Delay While Attacking is off: return early
If BedNuker has a target (bedPos != null): return early
attack_method.raycast_check: If Raycast setting is on: cast a ray from player eyes at head yaw/pitch. Only attack if the ray hits an ENTITY (not a block).
execution: mc.playerController.attackEntity(mc.thePlayer, e) - calls the vanilla attack method (sends C02PacketUseEntity ACTION_ATTACK)
If interact=true: send C02PacketUseEntity(e, Vec3(0,0,0)) then C02PacketUseEntity(e, INTERACT) - this is for hit registration on some servers
attack_method.switch_on_attack: If Switch On Attack is on: pick a new random target from validTargets (removing lastTarget first if multiple targets exist) and update lastSwitchTime

velocity_handling.description: onEvent catches PacketReceiveEvent for S12PacketEntityVelocity. When velocity is received for the local player, sets reduce=3 (unused counter in this module).

blink_utils_reference.purpose: Queues outgoing packets while active, then releases them when stopped. Used to hide sequences of packets (item swaps, unblock+block) from the server.
blink_utils_reference.startBlink(): Sets blinking=true. Subsequent packets are queued in a ConcurrentLinkedDeque<Packet<?>> instead of being sent.
blink_utils_reference.stopBlink(): Sets blinking=false. Releases ALL queued packets via network manager, clears the queue.
blink_utils_reference.stopBlinkNoC03(): Releases all packets EXCEPT C03PacketPlayer types, then stops blink.
blink_utils_reference.releaseOne(): Releases packets one at a time until a C03PacketPlayer variant is encountered (used for ladder placement).
blink_utils_reference.note: Somewhere in the net handler, when blinking=true, packets are diverted to the queue instead of being sent.

target_esp.description: Draws a pulsing ring (circle) at the target's feet that bounces up and down using a sine wave over 2 seconds. Color comes from the HUD color settings.

reset_logic.when: Called when target becomes null, bednuker is rotating, or target is out of block/sword range
what_it_does: If swapped: swap back to original slot (C09PacketHeldItemChange), set swapped=false
If autoblock is Hypixel/Hypixel2 and blocking: blink(true), random slot swap, unblock, increment asw
Else if b3 is true: stopBlink, b3=false, asw=0

client_main_loop.onPreUpdate: Calls KillAura.onPreUpdate() LAST (after all other modules). Also calls reset() if KillAura is not toggled.
client_main_loop.onMotionEvent(type=0): Calls KillAura.onPreMotion() first, then other modules
client_main_loop.onMotionEvent(type=1): Calls KillAura.onPostMotion() as part of all modules
client_main_loop.onMotionEvent(type=2): Calls KillAura.onSprint() as part of all modules
client_main_loop.onInputEvent(type=0): Calls KillAura.onPreInput() as part of all modules
client_main_loop.onRender(type=0): Calls KillAura.onRender3D() for target ESP ring

internal_classes: cryptix.Client (static instance, movefix flag, moduleManager, settingsManager)
minecraft_classes: net.minecraft.util.AxisAlignedBB, BlockPos, EnumFacing, MathHelper, MovingObjectPosition, Vec3

implementation_notes: The module extends an abstract Module class that provides sendPacket(), isToggled(), toggle(), display name management, and lifecycle hooks (onEnable/onDisable/onPreUpdate/etc).
Settings are registered with a global SettingsManager via Client.instance.settingsManager.addSetting().
Target selection runs every tick in onPreUpdate(). Target locking persists across ticks via lastTarget field.
The display name shows the current autoblock mode as a suffix (e.g., 'KillAura §7 Hypixel').
All autoblock modes that use blink rely on BlinkUtils to queue packets temporarily, which must be integrated with the net handler's packet send pipeline.
CPS randomization: minCPS + random.nextInt(maxCPS - minCPS + 8) provides jitter between min and max+7.

Movefix: sets a static boolean Client.movefix = true, which causes the input handler to remap movement inputs to match the modified yaw (prevents players from strafing in wrong directions with silent rotations).
The bednuker module is checked frequently - KillAura disables its own targeting/attacking when bednuker is active (targeting a bed).
